nodes.label: Refresh Token Storage Strategy Decision
nodes.rationale: DB-backed refresh tokens chosen over stateless JWT for token revocation, session management, and better production security; implemented with rotation, jti uniqueness, and token reuse detection

nodes.label: Storage Backend Strategy Decision
nodes.rationale: MinIO SDK integrated for horizontally scalable object storage; FileStore interface abstraction allows transparent swap between LocalStore (single-server) and MinioStore (multi-server) via STORAGE env var

nodes.label: Deployment Target Decision
nodes.rationale: Recommendation: start with single VPS (Fly.io/Railway) for prototype, scale to managed cloud (AWS/GCP) when hitting single-server limits; Kubernetes is overkill for sub-10K concurrent users

nodes.label: Scaling Limitations and Mitigations
nodes.rationale: Current limits: FFmpeg blocks API goroutine, HLS has no CDN, WebSocket caps at ~10K/instance, tsvector search slows after ~1M videos, local disk tied to single server

nodes.label: Production Architecture Diagram (CDN, API replicas, managed services)
nodes.norm_label: production architecture diagram (cdn, api replicas, managed services)
